raw_message: Dear Avik, I am writing to formally escalate the unacceptable service during our employee Rahul Gaur medical emergency (Emp ID: PM0227, Claim Number: 82086141). The entire process from admitted employee requiring surgery to securing the cashless facility was unnecessarily complicated. Health ID was not issued despite 20+ follow-up emails. Cashless facility was denied at the hospital. Our toll-free contact was unreachable. We will not be renewing our policy with Plum and will pursue legal avenues if not resolved immediately.

Dear Avik, I am extremely disappointed with the level of service provided post policy issuance. We recently had a claim under our policy and opted for reimbursement. The claim portal is extremely complex - we must upload documents one by one, there are specific requirements for scan format and color vs black & white, and to make matters worse the website failed after we completed the lengthy upload process. We are effectively fighting to submit documents to your platform rather than to the insurance company. We are seriously reconsidering our decision to choose Plum over a traditional offline agent.

Hi, We made payment on 20/02/2026 to add an employee to our group policy. As per your website the process takes 3-5 working days which has also elapsed. Today is 28/02/2026 and I am still following up. Wondering when will this get done? Please expedite.
Hi Avik, My brother is looking for an insurance for his firm. Can you reach out to him? Regards

Hi Mr Avik, At the moment I do not have any feedback to share as none of our employees have started using the app yet. I also requested the tax invoices which are still pending. Additionally I had requested a dedicated training session for our employees on how to use the Plum app. While there is a common training held every Thursday the session we attended was not very engaging and our employees were unable to ask questions or fully understand the application. It would be appreciated if you could arrange a proper training session specifically for our team.
Dear Avik, Request to call. Regards.

Avik, I am absolutely not satisfied and trust me I am not going to put a good word for Plum to anyone in the HR community. I don't want to waste my time in filling the survey as I have not seen any improvement for the past escalations as well. The claim for our employee has been pending for over 6 weeks with no resolution in sight.
